x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces DDC's capital-project / awarded-contract / vendor / division data and the solicitation pipeline, and adds submit_prequalification — the net-new B2G write workflow that today lives only inside citywide PASSPort/MOCS. There is no citizen write in this domain.

server.name: io.nyc.ddc
server.title: NYC Design & Construction (DDC)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Design and Construction — capital construction projects (infrastructure and public buildings), awarded construction contracts, the firms that hold them, DDC divisions, and open procurement solicitations, plus the net-new ability for a vendor to submit a prequalification / expression of interest that today lives only in the citywide PASSPort system.
server.instructions: Use find_projects / get_project (and get_project_contracts) to locate DDC-managed capital projects by borough, division, portfolio, client agency, or phase and drill into their contracts. NOTE the project datasets are periodic/historical snapshots, not live status. find_contracts / get_contract cover awarded construction contracts (keyed on PIN, firm, value). find_vendors lists firms doing business with DDC (designer/engineer/CM/contractor/consultant, M/WBE). list_divisions rolls the portfolio up by line of business. find_solicitations surfaces open opportunities that are actually released through citywide PASSPort and the City Record. submit_prequalification (net-new) is a vendor/B2G write — it requires an authenticated firm and mutates state; confirm the firm, role, and any target solicitation with the user before submitting. This is a vendor-facing agency: there is no citizen service or write here.

tools.name: find_projects
tools.title: Find Projects
tools.description: Search DDC capital construction projects by borough, division, portfolio (infrastructure/public buildings), client agency, phase, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_project
tools.title: Get Project
tools.description: Fetch a DDC capital project (scope, division, client agency, phase, dollar amount, projected completion) by Project ID.

tools.name: get_project_contracts
tools.title: Get Project Contracts
tools.description: List the awarded construction contracts tied to a capital project.

tools.name: find_contracts
tools.title: Find Contracts
tools.description: Search DDC awarded construction contracts by firm, client agency, dollar value, or free text (keyed on PIN).

tools.name: get_contract
tools.title: Get Contract
tools.description: Fetch a single awarded construction contract (description, selected firm, value) by PIN.

tools.name: find_vendors
tools.title: Find Vendors
tools.description: List firms doing business with DDC — designers, engineers, CMs, contractors, subcontractors, consultants — by role, M/WBE status, or prequalification status.

tools.name: list_divisions
tools.title: List Divisions
tools.description: List DDC divisions (Infrastructure, Public Buildings, and support units) with active-project counts and dollar rollups.

tools.name: find_solicitations
tools.title: Find Solicitations
tools.description: List open DDC procurement opportunities by category, division, or status. These are actually released through citywide PASSPort and noticed in the City Record — DDC has no owned solicitation API today.

tools.name: list_my_prequalifications
tools.title: List My Prequalifications
tools.description: List the authenticated firm's own prequalification / expression-of-interest submissions and their status — today visible only inside citywide PASSPort.

tools.name: submit_prequalification
tools.title: Submit Prequalification
tools.description: Submit a DDC vendor prequalification / expression of interest (optionally against a specific solicitation). NET-NEW workflow with no DDC-owned API today — it lives only in the citywide PASSPort platform run by MOCS. This is a vendor/B2G transaction (no citizen write exists in this domain). Requires an authenticated firm. Mutates state — confirm firm, role, and any target solicitation first.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.

prompts.name: explore_ddc
prompts.description: Search and read NYC Design & Construction (DDC) records — Projects, Contracts, Vendors, Divisions.

prompts.name: apply_for_ddc
prompts.description: VendorPrequalification — a firm submits a prequalification / expression of interest (optionally against a solicitation, with an optional City Record notice opt-in). A B2G write; DDC is vendor-facing, so there is no citiz

resources.name: NYC Design & Construction (DDC) — profile
resources.description: NYC Design & Construction (DDC): 11 operations, 10 tools, verb “surface”.

resources.description: A single NYC Design & Construction (DDC) Projects record by id.
